summary: Tested date sorting feature on /portal page for both One-Time Orders and Subscriptions tables. All sort interactions, icon changes, pagination resets, and search-after-sort flows work correctly.

issues: Minor: orders sort icon uses a ternary with ArrowUpDown fallback (line 221) but subs uses simpler binary check (line 337) — functionally equivalent since state is always 'asc' or 'desc', but a cosmetic inconsistency

orders_sort.click_desc_to_asc: PASS - dates changed to 2026-02-20 after click
orders_sort.icon_changes: PASS - arrow icon changes direction on toggle (verified via screenshot: ↓ becomes ↑)
orders_sort.pagination_reset: PASS - navigated to page 2, clicked sort, pagination showed '1–8 of 51'
orders_sort.search_after_sort: PASS - search returned 8 results after sort change

subscriptions_sort.click_desc_to_asc: PASS - dates changed to ['2026-02-20', '2026-02-21'...] after click
subscriptions_sort.icon_changes: PASS - SVG path changed from ArrowDown (M12 5v14 | m19 12-7 7-7-7) to ArrowUp (m5 12 7-7 7 7 | M12 19V5)
subscriptions_sort.pagination_reset: PASS - subs paginator shows '1–5 of 17' after sort change from page 2
subscriptions_sort.search_after_sort: PASS - search returned 5 results after sort change

critical_code_review_comments: Portal.tsx line 221: Orders uses ternary with ArrowUpDown fallback (`orderSort === 'desc' ? ArrowDown : orderSort === 'asc' ? ArrowUp : ArrowUpDown`) while subs line 337 uses binary check — functionally fine but minor inconsistency worth aligning
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account data (51 orders, 17 subscriptions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal sort feature fully implemented and tested. Both tables (orders: data-testid='portal-orders-sort-date', subs: data-testid='portal-subs-sort-date') have working sort buttons. Arrow icons change direction on click. Pagination resets to page 1 on sort change. Search works after sort change. Admin credentials: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
